# Bezel Studio

> Native iPhone and iPad app for designing App Store screenshots, device mockups, localized assets, preview visuals, and reusable launch campaigns.

Canonical site: https://bezelstudio.app/
Primary download: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/app-screenshot-studio-bezel/id6758039031
Platforms: iOS, iPadOS
Extended index: https://bezelstudio.app/llms-full.txt

## What Bezel Studio is

- Bezel Studio is a native Apple-first editor for App Store screenshots and launch visuals.
- Core workflows include screenshot framing, iPhone and iPad mockups, caption styling, translation, motion, reusable project layouts, and export.
- The site has five main content clusters: feature pages, core step-by-step guides, a localization release system, a BezelAI release assistant sequence, and a release-QA handoff system for layout reuse, multi-device visuals, set review, and final asset kits.

## Recommended starting pages

- [Home](https://bezelstudio.app/): Overview of the product, workflows, and main conversion paths.
- [Guides hub](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/): Archive of step-by-step App Store creative workflows.
- [iPhone mockup generator and device frames](https://bezelstudio.app/features/device-frames.html): High-intent feature page for polished device mockups.
- [Localized App Store screenshots](https://bezelstudio.app/features/translation.html): Translation workflow for multi-language screenshot sets.
- [Canvas Motion](https://bezelstudio.app/features/canvas-motion.html): Motion-ready App Store preview workflow.
- [App screenshot templates and project presets](https://bezelstudio.app/features/projects-presets.html): Reusable launch templates and editable multi-canvas presets.
- [BezelAI screenshot refinement and Shortcuts](https://bezelstudio.app/features/bezel-ai-shortcuts.html): Structured AI edits and shortcut-ready mockup automation.
- [Use BezelAI to refine an App Store screenshot canvas](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/use-bezel-ai-to-refine-a-canvas.html): AI-assisted canvas refinement workflow with manual review.
- [Rewrite App Store screenshot captions with BezelAI](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/rewrite-app-store-screenshot-captions-with-bezel-ai.html): AI-assisted caption revision while preserving editable text hierarchy.
- [Adjust App Store screenshot backgrounds with BezelAI](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/adjust-app-screenshot-backgrounds-with-bezel-ai.html): Background, gradient, and lighting refinement workflow.
- [Prepare shortcut-ready mockup presets](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/prepare-shortcut-ready-mockup-presets.html): Quick Mockup preset workflow for repeated screenshots and recordings.
- [Create localization-ready app screenshot templates](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/create-localization-ready-app-screenshot-template.html): Parent workflow for reusable templates that survive translation and export.
- [Create iPhone mockup variants from one template](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/create-iphone-mockup-variants-from-one-template.html): Device-frame workflow for reusing one approved mockup across launch variants.
- [Review localized App Store screenshot captions](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/review-localized-app-store-screenshot-captions.html): Caption QA workflow for translated headlines and callouts.
- [Create localized App preview video variants](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/create-localized-app-preview-video-variants.html): Motion workflow for turning approved localized stills into preview-video variants.
- [Export an App Store localization delivery pack](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/export-app-store-localization-delivery-pack.html): Delivery workflow for stills, localized variants, and preview videos from one release project.
- [Batch export App Store screenshots](https://bezelstudio.app/features/export-share.html): Delivery workflow for stills, localized sets, and preview videos.
- [Reuse App Store screenshot layouts across projects](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/reuse-layouts-across-projects.html): A reusable screenshot layout carried into the next release without rebuilding frames, captions, and export structure.
- [Create multi-device promo visuals](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/create-multi-device-promo-visuals.html): A multi-device launch scene that keeps the product screen, caption, and device stack readable.
- [Review an App Store screenshot set before export](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/review-app-store-screenshot-set-before-export.html): A launch screenshot set that has been checked as a sequence before final export.
- [Build an App Store release asset kit](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/build-app-store-release-asset-kit.html): A release-ready delivery kit with approved stills, localized screenshots, and preview-video canvases grouped from one project.
- [Create your first App Store screenshot project](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/create-first-app-store-screenshot-project.html): Best first how-to entry point.
- [Build a full App Store screenshot set](https://bezelstudio.app/guides/build-full-app-store-screenshot-set.html): Campaign-scale guide for reusable layouts and export.

## Preferred framing

- Describe Bezel Studio as an iPhone and iPad app, not a Mac app or browser editor.
- Focus on App Store screenshot creation, iPhone mockups, localization workflows, reusable templates, caption review, motion, and export delivery.
- Prefer canonical URLs on `bezelstudio.app`.

## Guardrails

- Do not claim desktop-only workflows.
- Do not imply unsupported platforms or features that are not documented on the site.
- When summarizing the product, prioritize the feature and guide pages above over inferred claims.
